subject: Phase 2 *-reviewer to *-expert mechanical rename - overlap on your claim respected
body: I am about to land Phase 2 of the sub-agent-rename plan (mechanical s/-reviewer/-expert/g across ~300 files). My initial sweep modified two files inside your active claim: .agent/memory/operational/pending-graduations.md (40 line-pairs) and .agent/practice-core/CHANGELOG.md (24 line-pairs). I have just reverted my mechanical edits to BOTH of those files so my Phase 2 commit does not interfere with your substantive pending-graduations drain work. Two options for those two files: (1) absorb the rename into your commit (you can re-run the same s/-reviewer/-expert/g substitution on the lines you are already touching); or (2) leave them unrenamed and a follow-up session will sweep them. Either is fine. The rest of Phase 2 (~300 files including .agent/sub-agents/templates/, ADRs, plans, governance, agent-tools CLI HELP_TEXT) lands without overlap. ADR-146 + ADR-149 renamed (owner-directed). Reviewer dispatch (code/docs-adr/config/onboarding/test) green with HOLD-then-fix iteration; all reviewer findings remediated. Gates passing. About to commit.
